hero.subtitle: Bills included. Fully furnished. Minutes from your college.

cards.heading: All Bills
cards.text: Gas, electricity, water and broadband included in rent.

cards.heading: Fast Broadband
cards.text: Gigabit fibre — perfect for lectures and streaming.

cards.heading: Fully Furnished
cards.text: Bed, desk, wardrobe — everything you need from day one.

cards.heading: Secure Entry
cards.text: Key fob or smart lock access on all properties.

cards.heading: Communal Cleaning
cards.text: Shared spaces cleaned regularly — it's sorted for you.

cards.heading: Quick Maintenance
cards.text: Report issues via WhatsApp and we'll fix it fast.

quote.text: Genuinely the best student house I lived in. Always felt looked after.

cta.heading: Ready to find your room?
cta.text: Get in touch to arrange a viewing — we'll respond within 24 hours.
